name: Detection Technology Oyj
summary: Detection Technology Oyj provides X-ray detector solutions for medical, security, and industrial applications in approximately 40 countries. The company offers X-ray line detectors, detector cards, and flat panel detectors; X-ray detector components, such as arrays and preamplifier ASICs; backside and frontside illuminated photodiode arrays; electronics; mechanics; and software products. Its X-ray detectors are used in computed tomography, digital mammography, bone densitometry, chest X-ray, and other medical applications; and X-ray imaging subsystems are used in train, vehicle, container, air cargo, and baggage and parcel scanning, as well as portable and people scanning. The company's products are also used in the agriculture, defense and aerospace, forest, mining, pharmaceutical, renewable energy, automotive, food, industrial process control, oil and gas, and recycling and waste sorting industries. Detection Technology Oyj was founded in 1991 and is based in Espoo, Finland.
